title: senecio rauhii
intro: Senecio rauhii, also known as Rauh's ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and is native to the Andes mountain range. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio rauhii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
